case_title: EMILIO FREIRE et al VS. DUDLEY BREGY VANCLEVE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2011 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-26-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,411.41 FILED BY FREIRE, EMILIO SOBOL, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT VANCLEVE, DUDLEY BREGY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-30-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR AND ADVISE THE COURT OF THE STATUS OF PROGRESS REPORT/ORDER OF EXAMINATION. IF NO APPEARANCES, ORDER OF EXAMINATION WILL BE DISCHARGED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2011 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-21-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY FREIRE, EMILIO SOBOL, SARAH VANCLEVE, DUDLEY BREGY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-25-2011 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR TO ADVISE THE COURT OF STATUS OF PAYMENTS/PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHEL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF EXAMINATION WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT FREIRE, EMILIO SOBOL, SARAH RECOVER FROM APPELLANT VANCLEVE, DUDLEY BREGY $6,015.45 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,015.45, *** VANCLEVE MAY PAY GEICO DIRECTLY, $3500.00, AND SUBTRACT THIS $3500.00 FROM THE ABOVE $6015.45 (IE: LEAVING $2515.45 TO BE PAID TO FREIRE/SOBOL) SINCE FREIRE/SOBOL HAVE ALREADY RECEIVED PAYMENT FROM GEICO. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A NEW OEX AND SERVE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WITH NEW DATE. CASE CALLED @ 11:23AM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREIRE, EMILIO SOBOL, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANCLEVE, DUDLEY BREGY $6,884.25 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,959.25, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF SARAH SOBOL IN THE AMOUNT OF $800.00 AND PLAINTIFF EMILIO FREIRE IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,084.25. THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES REASONABLY ATTRIBUTIBLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $6,884.25 AND THAT THE DEFENDANT WAS SOLELY AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FREIRE, EMILIO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELLE BRANT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, DEPT. 525)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF APR-01-2010
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT VANCLEVE, DUDLEY BREGY HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO APR-25-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY $100.00 PER MONTH STARTING NOVEMBER 1, 2010 AND CONTINUE MONTHLY. APPEARANCE BY ALL NAMED PARTIES. COMMSSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am
Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Appellant, Dudley Bregy Vancleve, appears in Pro Per; Respondents, Emilio Freire and Sarah Sobol, appear in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from the Judge.
10:16am
Case is submitted. No new evidence is marked or retained, though Judge Brant did keep two documents given to her by the Respondent, Mr. Freire.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Judgment Entered
